properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jehovah Jireh My provider His grace is sufficient For me, for me, for me Jehovah Jireh My provider His grace is sufficient For me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My God shall supply all my needs According to His riches in glory He will give His angels Charge over me Jehovah Jireh cares for me, for me, for me Jehovah Jireh cares for me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My God shall supply all my needs According to His riches in glory He will give His angels Charge over me Jehovah Jireh cares for me, for me, for me Jehovah Jireh cares for me, for me, for me Jehovah Jireh cares for me
